title: Phantomwings
description: This mod/datapack add an early game elytra with lower durability
body:
# Phantomwings 🪽

## Wath are the phantomwings❓
- The phantomwings are a craftable elytra crafted with diamonds and phantommembran ⚒️
- The elytra has only the half of the whole durability ⏱️

## Recipe⚒️

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c7583cd1061de72e915de657d550680ff15db23a.png)

This is the Recipe

## Important ❗
- If you use the datapack and the datapack is saying incompatible with this version ignore this message
- If you found any bug you can contact me by joining my discord server or over the [planetminecraft]() [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/members/tostbroti/projects) comments the fastest way is discord and pmc the most slow way
